creator: buchanon@manetheren.cl.msu.edu
text:
make on qpopper4 fails because it couldn't find librsaref.a

Fix: 

On my system I have rsaref-2.0 installed according to pkg_info.
	I found librsaref.a to be in /usr/local/lib.  I added 
	-L /usr/local/lib to the Makefile LIBS line in the work driectory.
How-To-Repeat: 	type make or make install in /usr/ports/mail/qpopper
